title: Thai Shrimp Spring Rolls
description: A classic Thai dish featuring shrimp spring rolls served with a sweet chili sauce. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Prepare the filling by combining shrimp, spring onions, bean sprouts, and chopped cilantro (if using) in a bowl.
Soak the spring roll wrappers in warm water for 10-15 minutes.
Assemble the rolls by placing a tablespoon of the filling in the center of each wrapper, then folding the bottom half over the filling, followed by the sides and finally the top.
Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry the rolls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the rolls on paper towels.
Serve the rolls with a sweet chili sauce (made by mixing fish sauce, sugar, and chili flakes) for dipping.
Optional: serve with chopped fresh cilantro and sliced lime wedges on the side.
